texto: Mermon's tiny black dot eyes managed to widen into larger black dots. "No, no, no, Sir. I was just... curious." "Curiosity is a good thing, like onion soup. But too much onion soup makes you breath smell terrible. and too much curiosity can make your whole body smell terrible, if it causes you to be dead." Veenie nodded carefully; it was a strange threat, but a threat nonetheless.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Michael Reisman: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “Mermon's tiny black dot eyes managed to widen into larger black dots. "No, no, no, Sir. I was jus…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, curiosity, onion-soup pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de humor e onion-soup.
